name: genomic-performance
description: |
  **Use this skill when the user asks about athletic potential, sports genetics,
  exercise response, workout optimization, muscle composition, endurance vs power,
  or "what sports am I genetically suited for".**

  Also triggers for: ACTN3, ACE gene, "power vs endurance", muscle fiber types,
  athletic performance, injury risk, recovery capacity, or training optimization.

  Analyzes genetic variants affecting physical performance and exercise response.
category: longevity-analysis/performance
---

# Performance Analysis

Analyzes genetic variants affecting athletic performance and physical fitness.

## Power vs Endurance

| Gene | rsID | Trait | Effect |
|------|------|-------|--------|
| ACTN3 | rs1815739 | Fast-twitch fiber | Power vs endurance |
| ACE | rs4340 | Angiotensin converting | Power vs endurance |
| PPARGC1A | rs8192678 | Mitochondrial biogenesis | Endurance capacity |

## Recovery & Injury

| Gene | rsID | Trait | Effect |
|------|------|-------|--------|
| MSTN | rs1805086 | Myostatin | Muscle growth potential |
| COL1A1 | rs1800012 | Collagen | Injury risk |
| VDR | rs1544410 | Vitamin D receptor | Bone health |

## Sleep & Recovery

| Gene | rsID | Function |
|------|------|----------|
| CLOCK | rs1801260 | Circadian rhythm |
| PER2 | rs2304672 | Sleep regulation |
| FABP7 | rs514345 | Sleep quality |

## Dashboard Design

- **Card Color**: Orange (#f97316) header
- **Bar chart**: Power vs endurance ratio
- **Sport icons**: Grid of recommended sports
- **Training calendar**: Optimized weekly schedule
